name: Kushki
description: Kushki — LatAm payment gateway focused on Colombia, Ecuador, Mexico, Chile, and Peru supporting cards and local bank rails.

seo.title: Kushki — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Kushki: Kushki — LatAm payment gateway focused on Colombia, Ecuador, Mexico, Chile, and Peru supporting cards and local bank rails.

when_to_use: Card and local bank rail payments across Colombia, Ecuador, Mexico, Peru, Chile
LatAm payment gateway for global platforms expanding beyond Brazil
Cross-border settlement for platforms with merchants in Andean markets
Single API covering Spanish-speaking LatAm payment method diversity

pros: Deep LatAm coverage in key 5 markets
Local bank rails beyond just card acquiring
Strong fraud tools tuned for region
cons: Docs stronger in Spanish than English
review.verdict: Credible LatAm gateway for merchants wanting local rails across Andean countries and Mexico through one API.
review.best_for: Global merchants expanding to Colombia, Ecuador, Mexico, Chile, Peru
review.not_for: Merchants focused only on Brazil or outside LatAm

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
